message:
test(conformance): bump FP-P2D-129 fixture floor from 5 to 9

Tightens the packet_filter_runs_io_round_trip_packet assertion to
require at least 9 fixtures instead of 5 now that the FP-P2D-129
packet has grown to include the additional json_round_trip_index /
json_round_trip_split / parquet_round_trip_with_nulls variants
alongside the original six format families.
